Class SigNozTracingProperties

java.lang.Object
io.signoz.springboot.properties.SigNozTracingProperties
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="signoz.tracing") public class SigNozTracingProperties extends Object
Tracing-specific configuration nested under signoz.tracing.*. 
signoz:
  tracing:
    enabled: true
    sample-rate: 1.0
    propagation: W3C
